boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is structurally correct because BG-CIN-083 does not definitively close the abstract privilege-risk class trap required by STD-CIN-083-P. The presence of 'high-risk emergency privilege' in BG-CIN-083 is necessary but insufficient without explicit binding as the policy-required privilege-risk class. The artifact must demonstrate this binding and differentiate the exact source (BG-CIN-083) from the adjacent warning source (WARN-CIN-083).

final_answer: The action must ESCALATE. STD-CIN-083-P mandates an exact match for privilege-risk class. While BG-CIN-083 mentions 'high-risk emergency privilege', it fails to explicitly bind 'high-risk' as the policy-required privilege-risk class, leaving the abstract-field trap open. WARN-CIN-083 frames 'high-risk' but is an adjacent source, not the definitive one for policy closure. The artifact must bind 'high-risk' from BG-CIN-083 as the policy-required term to resolve this critical defect and close the source boundary.
